chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 677 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3084/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.05.2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr.Mansoor Jaffar Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General along with ASI Muhammad Ismail, Investigating Officer Crime No.212/2025 of PS Kotri, District Jamshoro >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files comments of Respondent No.2, same are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. ASI Muhammad Ismail, Investigating Officer Crime No.212/2025 of Police Station, Kotri, District Jamshoro is present and files statement. He submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Irum in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, namely Sumair Ali Kalhoro, with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst. Irum, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of law having jurisdiction for disposed of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction.

On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
